attacking_style: Launches decisive solo attacks on final climbs from established breakaways, willing to commit with significant distance remaining (4km+) despite physical distress.
team_tactics: Operates with minimal visible team support; relies on breakaway positioning rather than domestique-led setups for opportunities.
terrain_preference: Final categorized climbs within breakaway scenarios where sustained power can create separation; struggles to convert when terrain favors pure sprint finishes.
vulnerability: Fails to deliver in sprint finishes even within small groups (8-rider break); susceptible to severe cramping under pressure despite mental resilience.
key_patterns: Attacks solo from breakaways on final climbs rather than contesting group finishes (2 instances)
Exhibits strong mental control under physical crisis, maintaining focus when cramping severely (2017 win)
Underperforms in tactical sprint scenarios within small groups despite breakaway success (7th from 8-rider break)
form_trajectory: negative: 2017 Tour stage win from break with cramping overcame showed promise, but 2018 failure to convert hometown break advantage suggests declining effectiveness
